DIVIDEND VOUCHER NPM Limited Company no. 137792C Registered office: 18 Athol St, Douglas, IM DECLARATION DATE SHAREHOLDER 03 Jul 2026 N. Meyer SHAREHOLDING DIVIDEND PER SHARE 100 ordinary £1 £30.00 TOTAL DIVIDEND £3,000.00 No dividend withholding tax is deducted under the active jurisdiction pack (withholding: none). This voucher records the dividend declared by NPM Limited on 03 Jul 2026 to N. Meyer , holder of 100 ordinary £1 . Signed for and on behalf of the company N. Meyer
